why_it_matters: Naively stitching expiring contracts creates price gaps that are not real P&L.
correct_action: Use a back-adjusted series or explicitly roll positions in the backtest.

why_it_matters: GC settlement and GLD close can be captured at different times, creating fictitious arbitrage profit.
correct_action: Use intraday futures price at the same timestamp as the ETF close.

why_it_matters: A futures-based ETF can hedge spot exposure but also remove the roll edge.
correct_action: Use a true spot proxy where possible: GLD for gold; XLE is closer than USO for crude roll harvesting.

why_it_matters: Funding treatment differs by strategy construction.
correct_action: Do not subtract risk-free for futures-only or dollar-neutral long/short; subtract it when cash is spent on GLD.
